input_text: Elephants have long trunks and short tails. The letter was written. The children playing in the garden laughed. The city was destroyed. The blue hand of a man moved a wheel of the large wheelbarrow. Americans cannot disappear. Daniel went back to the bathroom. The stone was heavy. Tallinn is in Latvia with a probability 50 percent. The teacher showed the students the map. A village road was narrow. Estonia contains Tartu. Clinton defeated Dole. Sandra travelled to the office. Eve reported that Tom arrived. John is a car. Mary's brother carrying a box entered. Sheep are afraid of mice. The picture was painted by Leo. Mike is nice. A coffee cup broke. The bike's length is 10 kilometers. If X1 is a father of Y1 and Y1 is a father of Z1, X1 is a grandfather of Z1. Gertrude is a wolf. Sue is a true patriot. Mr Dursley is a Muggle. Unexpectedly, the door opened. The tree was cut by the farmer. This book is more interesting than that one. Agatha is in trouble. "Riga is not in America. A chocolate cake fell. The horse kept in the stable was calm. Did Tom depart?
